rules.name: no-force-push-strict
rules.reason: No force pushes of any kind, including --force-with-lease.

rules.name: no-amend
rules.reason: Don't rewrite history with --amend. Create a new commit instead.

rules.name: pr-create-must-be-draft
rules.reason: PRs must be created as drafts. Mark ready for review only after human approval.
